prompt:
Create a polished square marketing visual for Image Quick.
Subject: a calm silver tabby cat beside a creative workstation
Style: clean editorial illustration, startup landing-page hero, premium but playful
Composition: clear focal subject with room for title text, centered balanced layout
Lighting: soft studio lighting
Color direction: warm cream, charcoal, muted coral accents
Background: subtle paper texture
Constraints: high legibility; no watermark; brand-safe; single coherent scene
Avoid: blurry details; garbled text; distorted anatomy
